title: Acadia's 'very bullish' sales forecast restores some confidence on Wall Street
text: Acadia Pharmaceuticals' raised guidance for full-year 2025 revenue following strong Q2 results has restored investor confidence. The company projects total revenue between $1.045-$1.095 billion, up from previous guidance of $1.030-$1.095 billion. Analyst commentary described the guidance as 'very bullish,' highlighting the company's confidence in its commercial execution. Both NUPLAZID and DAYBUE showed strong momentum, with NUPLAZID up 7% and DAYBUE up 14% year-over-year in Q2. The DAYBUE STIX formulation launch is expected to provide additional growth runway. Pipeline catalysts including Phase III COMPASS PWS results for ACP-101 and Phase II remlifanserin data in Alzheimer's disease psychosis are anticipated in the near term. The market response to Acadia's guidance was positive, with several analysts reiterating buy ratings.
